title: aubletia petoumo
side_effects: Aubletia petoumo can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and coughing. Some individuals may also experience headaches, stomach cramps, or diarrhea as a result of improper use. Additionally, pregnant or breastfeeding women should avoid using Aubletia petoumo altogether due to potential risks to fetal or infant health.
